## Summary

What changed and why?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Skill improvement
- [ ] Helper script/tooling
- [ ] Installer or CI
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Beta report
- [ ] Other

## Testing

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `bash -n install.sh`
- [ ] Manual Claude Code install test, if relevant

## Skill Checklist

- [ ] Uses `.claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md`
- [ ] Uses natural language examples, not fake slash commands
- [ ] Avoids unsupported exact savings claims
- [ ] Includes tests for helper code, if helper code changed

## Notes
